text.title: Change Request Rate Card Template Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing a valid Change Request Rate Card Template `spec` artefact produced from typed inputs.

setup.p: Client: Acme Corp. Engagement: Q2 2026 retainer extension. Operator: ruslan@faion.net.

inputs.input: wiki://pm/acme/notes/2026-05-22.md — latest weekly notes capturing scope, blockers, decisions.
repo://artefacts/acme/baseline-2026-05-15.json — previous spec artefact for this engagement.
wiki://pm/acme/raci-q2.md — named accountable owners per workstream.

transformation.step: Load three inputs by path; verify all present.
Fill the spec fields, citing each input by name in `rationale`.
Run failure-mode detectors; rewrite rationale to remove a defensive `clearly` phrase (fm-posthoc-rationale).

example.verdict: PASS — every field traces to a named input; owner is a single accountable handle; version + last_reviewed advance from the baseline.
